ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the match was played */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "finalist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finalist team */,
  "winner_score" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "finalist_score" INTEGER /* Score of the finalist team */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "assistant_referee_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth official */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_finalist_id FOREIGN KEY ("finalist_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the team represents */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "fifa_code" TEXT /* FIFA code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., stadium name) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the location is situated */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., shots, fouls, corners) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks */,
  "offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position in the tournament */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won */,
  "games_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "goals_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the tournament */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (matches without conceding a goal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_statistics" (
  "venue_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue statistic */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played at the venue */,
  "average_attendance" REAL /* Average attendance at the venue */,
  "highest_attendance" INTEGER /* Highest attendance at the venue */,
  "lowest_attendance" INTEGER /* Lowest attendance at the venue */,
  "highest_temperature" REAL /* Highest temperature recorded at the venue during the year */,
  "lowest_temperature" REAL /* Lowest temperature recorded at the venue during the year */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature at the venue during the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_statistics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "substituted_in" INTEGER /* Time of substitution in (if applicable) */,
  "substituted_out" INTEGER /* Time of substitution out (if applicable) */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the player (if a defender or goalkeeper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player represents */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the player represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left or right) */,
  "joined_team_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "left_team_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
